name: Phoenix Pawn
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop in Sun City, AZ specializing in gold jewelry, firearms, and collateral loans since 2009, with on-site jewelry and watch repair.
description_long:
Phoenix Pawn opened its doors on November 1, 2009, in the West Valley of Phoenix, Arizona. Owned and operated by George and his wife, the shop has built its reputation over 15-plus years on honesty, fairness, and customer respect. Located at 9010 North 103rd Avenue in Sun City — near the University of Phoenix Stadium and Westgate Entertainment District — it serves the surrounding residential community with pawn loans and outright purchases of valuables.

The shop's core offerings center on buying and lending against gold, silver, jewelry, firearms, and motorcycles. Beyond collateral lending and resale, Phoenix Pawn provides gun transfer (FFL) services at a flat $25 fee. On-site jewelry services are a standout: the shop offers stone replacement, repair, engraving, custom jewelry work, watch repair, and complimentary jewelry cleaning during business hours.

What sets Phoenix Pawn apart from a typical pawn operation is the depth of in-house expertise. Jim, the on-site jeweler, brings over 35 years of professional experience including a background with Zales, enabling repairs and redesigns that most pawn shops outsource. The flat $25 gun transfer rate is also explicitly marketed as one of the best — and the only flat-rate option — in the Phoenix metro area, which is a concrete differentiator for firearm buyers.

For consumers seeking emergency liquidity, Phoenix Pawn offers a straightforward collateral loan path on jewelry, precious metals, and firearms. However, the shop operates limited hours — closed Sunday and Monday, and only until 4pm on Thursdays and Saturdays — which may be inconvenient for working adults. Pawn loan terms and interest rates are not disclosed on the website, so borrowers should ask upfront before pledging items. Like all pawn shops, this is a short-term, high-cost borrowing option; it is best used when speed and accessibility matter more than rate.
pros: Flat $25 gun transfer fee — marketed as the only flat rate in the Phoenix metro area
On-site master jeweler with 35+ years experience including Zales background
Free jewelry cleaning available during all business hours
Full jewelry services: stone replacement, engraving, custom work, and watch repair
Family-owned and operated with 15+ years of community presence
Buys and lends against diverse collateral: gold, silver, jewelry, firearms, and motorcycles
Established reputation built on stated values of honesty and customer respect since 2009
cons: Limited hours — closed Sunday and Monday, short Saturday hours (10am–4pm)
No loan rates, terms, or LTV ratios disclosed on the website
Pawn loans are inherently short-term and high-cost relative to traditional credit
Single location only — no branches or online services mentioned
No mention of licensing, state compliance disclosures, or BBB/review platform presence on the website
best_for: Residents in Sun City and the West Valley needing quick cash against jewelry or firearms
Firearm buyers seeking an affordable flat-rate FFL transfer in the Phoenix area
Customers needing jewelry repair, watch repair, or custom jewelry work done locally
Sellers looking to liquidate gold, silver, or unwanted jewelry
diagnosis: Phoenix Pawn is best suited for West Valley Phoenix residents who need fast collateral-based cash against jewelry or firearms, or who want affordable gun transfers and on-site jewelry repair. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs are not disclosed online, and limited hours (closed Sunday–Monday) reduce accessibility for working borrowers.
